name: COMFORT SYSTEMS USA INC
business: Comfort Systems USA provides mechanical and electrical contracting services, including heating, ventilation, air conditioning, plumbing, piping, controls, and electrical systems. They build, install, maintain, repair, and replace mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) systems for commercial, industrial, and institutional facilities.
sellsTo: Commercial, industrial, and institutional MEP markets

exposures.sentence: The increase in demand has been especially strong in the technology sector, particularly for data centers.
We build, install, maintain, repair and replace mechanical, electrical and plumbing (MEP) systems through our 50 operating units with 190 locations in 142 cities throughout the United States.

catalysts.sentence: Century, which was acquired on January 1, 2025

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Right Way Plumbing & Mechanical LLC
catalysts.sentence: Right Way, which was acquired May 1, 2025
Feyen Zylstra, which was acquired on October 1, 2025
Meisner, which was acquired on October 1, 2025

catalysts.event: Amendment of senior credit facility increasing borrowing capacity from $850M to $1.10B
catalysts.sentence: On August 27, 2025, we amended our senior credit facility ... which increases our borrowing capacity from $850.0 million to $1.10 billion.

catalysts.event: Board approved extension of share repurchase program by 0.4 million shares
catalysts.sentence: On May 16, 2025, the Board approved an extension to the program by increasing the shares authorized for repurchase by 0.4 million shares.

tamClaims.claim: Annual revenue of commercial, industrial, and institutional mechanical and electrical contracting in the United States is approximately $700 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe that commercial, industrial, and institutional mechanical and electrical contracting generate annual revenue in the United States of approximately $700 billion.
